'''layolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeatin|zeatin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeatin|zeatin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| layolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyeleth|læyeleth]] || [[word:læyelej|læyelej]] || [[word:læyelesh|læyelesh]] || [[word:læyele|læyele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:layoyoloth|layoyoloth]] || [[word:layoyoloj|layoyoloj]] || [[word:layoyolosh|layoyolosh]] || [[word:layoyolo|layoyolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:layoloth|layoloth]] || [[word:layoloj|layoloj]] || [[word:layolosh|layolosh]] || [[word:layolo|layolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:layoflofth|layoflofth]] || [[word:layoflofj|layoflofj]] || [[word:layoflofsh|layoflofsh]] || [[word:layoflof|layoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layolotho|layolotho]] || [[word:layolojo|layolojo]] || [[word:layolosho|layolosho]] || [[word:layoloko|layoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layoloth|layoloth]] || [[word:layoloj|layoloj]] || [[word:layolosh|layolosh]] || [[word:layolo|layolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layolothol|layolothol]] || [[word:layolojol|layolojol]] || [[word:layoloshol|layoloshol]] || [[word:layolokol|layolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layoloothotho|layoloothotho]] || [[word:layoloojojo|layoloojojo]] || [[word:layolooshosho|layolooshosho]] || [[word:layolooko|layolooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layolothon|layolothon]] || [[word:layolojon|layolojon]] || [[word:layoloshon|layoloshon]] || [[word:layolokon|layolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layolothooro|layolothooro]] || [[word:layolojooro|layolojooro]] || [[word:layoloshooro|layoloshooro]] || [[word:layolokooro|layolokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
